name: Eusan Composite Armor K4
desc: The K4 Composite Armor is the newest armor developed specifically for use on the new generation of warships being deployed. Feature several layers of different materials bolted between the outer hull and inner pressure hull as well as improved spall lining for critical areas of the ship. The main aim of this armoring is to provide the most protection against common threat types. It is optimized for protection against anti-armor projectiles. Against energy weaponry it provides improved protection compared to the previous generation but still struggles against those types of weapons.

name: Eusan Advanced Flag Facilities
desc: Specially designated warships are fitted with advanced command and control facilities that will allow fleet admirals to issue commands more efficently than other ships. As the Admiral is the newest class of warships placed into service, it has the distinction of being fitted out with the most up to date equipment.

name: Eusan Electronic Warfare Suite
desc: The Volksmarine requires almost every warship in service to be equipped with the standard electronic warfare suites. The current models in widespread use is the Type 90s featuring triple band antennas. Regardless of the model, each is designed to provide the ship with ECM and ECCM capability. Depending on the ship size, the ECM rating for frigates %s, destroyers %s, cruisers %s, and captial ships %s.

name: #Eusan Replika Cadre
desc: Each Eusan warship have a cadre of Replikas to assist in maintainence and repair. Where the human crew may have issues with working nonstop, the Replikas have no such issues. Far more efficent and skilled at repairs, the Replikas will reduce the resources consumed, improve crew readiness rates and increase repair rates.

name: Eusan Engineering
desc: After decades of destructive interstellar warfare over the future of the Eusan people, the Nation embarked on a comprehensive refit plan to all existing warships as well as incorporating new specifications into new warship designs. An emphasis to design purpose built equipment for the Volksmarine was pushed instead of using redesigned versions of equipment from civilian or Volksarmee sources. Although logistically, it made sense to use the same equipment, the Volksmarine have long argued that inefficencies from such procurement plan reduced combat capability. Through a series of clever political manuvering, they finally gained enough political support to engineer Volksmarine specific equipment.

name: Operation Penrose
desc: Operation Penrose, the flagship exploration program of our Great Nation! The three exploration phases are as follows: Phase 1 from day 1 to 1500. Phase 2 is from day 1500 to 3000. Phase 3 is day 3000 and beyond. It is currently day %s
